query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.ownerOpenId, 
       m.id as media_id, m.filename, m.latitude, m.longitude, m.altitude
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN media m ON p.id = m.projectId
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Forney%' OR p.name LIKE '%Construction%'
ORDER BY p.id, m.id
LIMIT 20;
